summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Amani Temptress Spa luxury website. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend UI mostly working with minor UX issues in form feedback.

ui_bugs.component: Calendar date picker in booking form
ui_bugs.issue: Selected date from calendar not properly saved to form field, shows validation error 'Please select a date'

integration_issues.issue: Success toast notifications not consistently visible after form submission, though forms submit successfully to backend

passed_tests: All 10 backend API endpoints working correctly
Hero section loads with correct headline 'Where Desire Meets Indulgence'
Navigation scrolling to correct sections (Home, Services, Contact)
Services section shows 8 massage service cards
Service modal opens and closes correctly
Contact information displays correctly (phone +254710574902, email amanitemptressspa@gmail.com)
Form validation working (backend returns 422 for invalid data)
Forms submit successfully to backend and reset after submission
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (10/10), Frontend: 85% (most features working with minor UX issues)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix date picker in booking form to properly save selected date. Investigate toast notifications - they may be appearing briefly or positioned off-screen. Forms are working functionally but user feedback could be improved.
